changes.reason: Squeeze_long is the cleanest active VALID_0DTE expansion candidate: 7 trades, $604.5 PnL, $344.8 per exposure hour, no slow trades, and worst MAE only -194.25. Raising the adaptive cap to the top grid value tests whether the large observed MFE can be harvested without adding entries.

Move the fixed TP to the upper grid bound to test pure upside capture in the high-efficiency squeeze profile. Current median MFE is far above the configured scalp target, so this is a bounded profit-capture experiment rather than a trade-count expansion.
Require a stronger continuation slope when asking the profile to hold for more. This keeps the TP expansion tied to momentum quality and avoids applying wider targets to flat-VWAP squeezes.

expected_effect: Should increase squeeze_long average PnL and possibly total net profit while keeping trade count near baseline and preserving low MAE. Main tradeoff is slower exits or fewer squeeze trades if the higher target and slope confirmation are too selective; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001, trade count drops over 10%, PnL/exposure falls, or squeeze MAE worsens materially.
label: promote
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_b_squeeze_long_take_profit. The latest pullback expansion was low-quality exposure, while 1DTE tightening and call-wall loosening have already failed. Squeeze_long remains underexplored, highly efficient, and clean, so the next non-duplicate test should be a stronger but still bounded squeeze upside-capture run using only profile-specific TP and momentum keys.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: squeeze_long produced 7 VALID_0DTE trades, $604.5 PnL, $344.83 PnL/exposure hour, no slow >=12h trades, worst MAE -194.25, and median MFE 66.3. This is much cleaner than pullback_long, which created the latest -2026.5 MAE slow tail.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Squeeze Continuation Upside Capture Holdout
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Higher targets may lengthen holds or reduce TP realization, and the stronger slope threshold may remove profitable early squeeze entries.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE squeeze_long entries with confirmed squeeze/option context and stronger ES VWAP continuation slope.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: squeeze_long average PnL and total PnL improve, total net profit remains at least 98% of run_001, completed trades remain within 10%, PnL/exposure hour stays flat or better, and profile worst MAE remains no worse than roughly -250.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Extended VWAP Recovery-State Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves toward <= -527 or better while retaining >=95% protected extended-VWAP winner PnL.
